name: Chili Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 can tomatoes and juice (16 ounces) or more as desired
4 teaspoons chili powder, or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown onion in butter in a skillet.
2. Add ground beef and brown.
3. Drain off excess fat.
4. Stir in remaining ingredients except cheese.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Transfer mixture to a 3-quart baking dish and sprinkle with cheddar cheese.
7. Bake at 350°F for 40 to 50 minutes.
Serves 6 to 8.
